name: Frasier Temple
subtitle: the maker in the cathedral

ultimate_ability.label: The Other Eye
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game, look at the next 5 Gravity cards and rearrange them in any order. Frasier sees how the room is going to speak to him.

notes: Frasier's hand uses the maker's loop — DRAFT / BURN / RECORD / TUNE as starters instead of the Fool's waiter-loop. Buyable pool is DEMONS (programs scoped to a domain space). Second stat is DOUBT (rises bad, kills him at max). Stagnation replaces Inertia. Spec: lore/_TAROT_GAUNTLET_SCENARIOS.md.
